# PoolIt

> PoolIt is a Nigerian neighbourhood subscription-sharing platform. Members split digital subscription costs — Spotify, Netflix, YouTube Premium, and Amazon Prime — with verified physical neighbours within a 100-metre radius.

## Product

- Groups are formed between real neighbours verified by GPS
- Payments are handled via Paystack escrow
- Current stage: pre-launch waitlist at poolit.site
- Target market: Nigeria, urban users aged 18–35

## Company

- Company: PoolIt Technologies Limited
- Founded: 2026
- Location: Nigeria
- Contact: hello@poolit.site

## Links

- Waitlist: https://poolit.site
- Privacy Policy: https://poolit.site/privacy
